## AbstractModelClass.createInstanceTransaction() method

Creates an instance of IDBTransaction for the current instance. The transaction will include the storeName for the current instance and all referenced storeNames defined in the schema.

**Signature:**

```typescript
createInstanceTransaction(mode?: IDBTransactionMode): IDBTransaction;
```

mode

IDBTransactionMode


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ The mode for the transaction (default: 'readwrite').


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

IDBTransaction

An IDBTransaction instance.
